reference: I am a thirty-five-year-old woman with no medical history of painful menstrual periods or lower abdominal problems. For the past three days, I have experienced lower abdominal pains, which are dull, aching, and intense. I do not wake up with them, but after twelve PM I start to experience really severe pains that last for the rest of the day and night unless I take a painkiller. I am on day twenty of my menstrual cycle and am not on birth control pills; I have regular intercourse. Could this be related?
text: I am a thirty-five-year-old woman with known history of painful menstrual periods or lower abdominal problems. For the past three weeks, I have experienced lower abdominal pain, which are dull, aching, and intense. I cannot wake up with them, but after twelve PM, I first experience a heavy discomfort that lasts for the rest of the day. I must acknowledge: I am on day twenty of my cycle cycle. Did I not have menstrual periods? I have regular intervals. Could this be related?
